title: the pill that Kaji gives Misato
display_title: the pill that Kaji gives Misato
wikitext:
[]: the pill that Kaji gives Misato             Quote Post by ericm » Tue Jun 07, 2011 8:55 pm Just rewatched this scene..Anyone understand what was going on here exactly? Was he trying to put that..down there? I don't get it.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Tue Jun 07, 2011 8:59 pm You have many questions. But thats good, it means you want knowledge. That is (as far as I am taught) a good thing to lust. Anyways, I'm not sure that that is actually a pill, or one of those teeny tiny containers to keep messages in that look like pills. Someone should help clarify on that. And remember: It probably is what you think it is. If you don't understand it, re-watch it until you get it. If you reach twenty and still don't understand, ask then. Keep in mind to read the wiki that was made for these questions (there is also theory and analysis, which will help).

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jun 07, 2011 9:45 pm It's an empty capsule with a data chip inside it containing some of Kaji's findings. He was apparently giving it to Misato in a "playful manner"...

[]:             Quote Post by illustriusCheese » Wed Jun 08, 2011 12:48 am It's a lil capsule that has some of his findings in it. He probably gave it to her that way because he was being watched.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Jun 08, 2011 2:12 am illustriusCheese wrote: He probably gave it to her that way because he was being watched.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Jun 08, 2011 8:53 am Reichu wrote: It's an empty capsule with a data chip inside it containing some of Kaji's findings. He was apparently giving it to Misato in a "playful manner"...
